final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide design for the Changan Origin Q06 September launch, intended as a brand presentation hero visual with cinematic automotive gravitas.

Style/medium: automotive brand presentation cover, with the crystalline depth of a premium launch keynote — glass-and-steel clarity meeting the charged stillness before a reveal
Composition: centered title hierarchy over a full-bleed background, title and subtitle anchored in the lower third, breathing room above for the visual to command
Subject: Changan Origin Q06 as the implied presence — the brand energy rather than a literal product shot; the cover communicates arrival, not specification
Scene/backdrop: translucent, luminous deep-space backdrop — layers of light refracting through dark glass, electric blue and silver gradients suggesting velocity held in suspension, the feeling of a stage moment before the curtain lifts
Lighting/mood: the charged anticipation of a launch night — cool electric light cutting through deep shadow, a single beam of clarity in a field of restrained drama
Color palette: deep midnight blue in tension with electric silver and a precise accent of Changan brand red, the temperature of ambition
Materials/textures: polished carbon-fiber undertone beneath a glassy translucent surface, light refracting as if through tempered crystal
Text (verbatim): 长安起源Q06  将于9月上市
Constraints: two-line title hierarchy — 长安起源Q06 as primary headline, 将于9月上市 as subtitle; text must be legible against the background; overall composition must read as a premium automotive brand PPT cover
Avoid: generic stock-photo car imagery, busy cluttered layouts, warm or earthy tones, soft lifestyle aesthetics, stuffer gradients with no structural purpose
